message:
fix(sync): preserve existing deps/labels when bulk query returns incomplete results

The export path was clearing deps/labels for issues not found in
bulk DB queries. If fsqlite failed to read some rows, this silently
destroyed valid data. Now preserves existing values when the bulk
query has no entry, preventing silent data loss.

Closes #149

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
